summary: ThreeDScene with BLUE_D Sphere R=1.8 inscribed in a YELLOW_E ParametricSurface cylinder of radius R, height 2R. At latitude φ=45° a RED sphere-ring and GREEN cylinder-ring mark the projected band, connected by 12 WHITE Arrow3D radial projectors via LaggedStart. Fixed-frame derivation bottom-right: sphere area element ΔA = R dφ · R cos φ dθ; cylinder image stretches width by 1/cos φ, squishes height by cos φ — area preserved. Conclusion 'A_sphere = A_cylinder lateral = 2πR · 2R = 4πR²' in YELLOW, boxed.
